contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 30
- Description: Credential profile QR code + embed in PDF
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/lineage-engine/pull/8
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta/pull/102
  
  Details:
  Extended CV credentialing platform so every profile carries a scannable QR back to its own URL.
  
  Changes:
  - lineage-engine: build_cv_cache.py now writes _cache/cv/<slug>.qr.png for every CV, embeds the QR in the rendered PDF (top-right, business-card style), and records qr_code{path,target_url} on the unified CV JSON. New scripts/qr_code.py helper ships the TrueSight icon and mirrors the Agroverse QR generator's style.
  - lineage-credentials: triggered a cache rebuild so all 377 profiles now have QR PNGs on main.
  - truesight_me_beta: credentials/index.html displays the QR top-right of the header, anchored so clicking opens the full-size PNG; mobile-stacks below the name at <=560px.
  
  Scan target: https://truesight.me/credentials/#<slug> — laptop-to-phone sharing in one scan.
  
  PRs:
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/lineage-engine/pull/8
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta/pull/102
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 50.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
